description: Holds a reference to CUDA memory. The CUDA memory will be deallocated when this class is destructed.

members.name: ptr
members.description: Returns the raw memory pointer address for the CUDA memory.

members.name: size
members.description: Returns the size of the CUDA Memory, in bytes.

members.name: shape
members.description: Returns the CUDAMemoryShape Class describing this CUDA memory. See the help for that class for notes about channel order for different data types.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the CUDAMemory Class wiki page
